mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, NVL(p.safety_qty, 0) AS safety_qty, NVL(SUM(il.current_qty), 0) AS available_qty FROM product p LEFT JOIN inventory_lot il ON p.product_id = il.product_id AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 91 WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.safety_qty

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, il.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty FROM product p JOIN inventory_lot il ON p.product_id = il.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 91

SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, il.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, il.expiry_date, il.current_qty FROM product p JOIN inventory_lot il ON p.product_id = il.product_id WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND il.status = 'NORMAL' AND il.current_qty > 0 AND il.expiry_date <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 91
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO alert ( alert_id, product_id,
inventory_lot_id,
alert_type, message, created_at, alert_level ) VALUES ( #{alertId}, #{productId},
#{inventoryLotId},
#{alertType}, #{message}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{alertLevel} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.alert_id, a.product_id, p.product_name, a.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.message, a.created_at FROM alert a JOIN product p ON a.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN inventory_lot il ON a.inventory_lot_id = il.inventory_lot_id ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.alert_id, a.product_id, p.product_name, a.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.message, a.created_at, ad.emp_id, ad.dept_id, d.dept_code, ad.role_code, ad.is_read, ad.is_delivered FROM alert_detail ad JOIN alert a ON ad.alert_id = a.alert_id JOIN product p ON a.product_id = p.product_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = ad.dept_id LEFT JOIN inventory_lot il ON a.inventory_lot_id = il.inventory_lot_id WHERE ad.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.alert_id, a.product_id, p.product_name, a.inventory_lot_id, il.lot_no, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.message, a.created_at, ad.emp_id, ad.dept_id, ad.role_code, ad.is_read, ad.is_delivered FROM alert_detail ad JOIN alert a ON ad.alert_id = a.alert_id JOIN product p ON a.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN inventory_lot il ON a.inventory_lot_id = il.inventory_lot_id WHERE ad.is_delivered = 'N' ORDER BY a.created_at
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_detail WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND is_read = 'N'
